001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import java.time.LocalDate;
004
005public class BatchCardSummary {
006
007  private final long batchId;
008  private final Integer batchNumber;
009  private final String incubatorName;
010  private final String breedSummary;
011  private final int viableCount;
012  private final int totalEggCount;
013  private final double viabilityRate;
014  private final LocalDate expectedHatchDate;
015  private final String nextMilestoneLabel;
016  private final LocalDate nextMilestoneDate;
017
018  public BatchCardSummary(
019      long batchId,
020      Integer batchNumber,
021      String incubatorName,
022      String breedSummary,
023      int viableCount,
024      int totalEggCount,
025      double viabilityRate,
026      LocalDate expectedHatchDate,
027      String nextMilestoneLabel,
028      LocalDate nextMilestoneDate
029  ) {
030    this.batchId = batchId;
031    this.batchNumber = batchNumber;
032    this.incubatorName = incubatorName;
033    this.breedSummary = breedSummary;
034    this.viableCount = viableCount;
035    this.totalEggCount = totalEggCount;
036    this.viabilityRate = viabilityRate;
037    this.expectedHatchDate = expectedHatchDate;
038    this.nextMilestoneLabel = nextMilestoneLabel;
039    this.nextMilestoneDate = nextMilestoneDate;
040  }
041
042  public long getBatchId() {
043    return batchId;
044  }
045
046  public Integer getBatchNumber() {
047    return batchNumber;
048  }
049
050  public String getIncubatorName() {
051    return incubatorName;
052  }
053
054  public String getBreedSummary() {
055    return breedSummary;
056  }
057
058  public int getViableCount() {
059    return viableCount;
060  }
061
062  public int getTotalEggCount() {
063    return totalEggCount;
064  }
065
066  public double getViabilityRate() {
067    return viabilityRate;
068  }
069
070  public LocalDate getExpectedHatchDate() {
071    return expectedHatchDate;
072  }
073
074  public String getNextMilestoneLabel() {
075    return nextMilestoneLabel;
076  }
077
078  public LocalDate getNextMilestoneDate() {
079    return nextMilestoneDate;
080  }
081}
